title: INOD Valuation PE Ratio Trading Multiples Analysis
text: INOD Valuation and Trading Multiples. P/E Ratio Comparisons: Trailing PE ratio 85.55, forward PE ratio 101.20. PE Ratio (TTM) 101.05 as of May 11, 2026, which is 10% below 10-year median of 111.79. P/E ratio 76.55 as of May 8, 2026, representing 56.51% increase compared to 12-month average P/E ratio of 48.91. Industry Comparison: Software industry median PE Ratio (TTM) 21.13. INOD's PE Ratio (TTM) ranked worse than 84.95% of 1641 companies in Software industry. Historical Context: INOD's average P/E ratio over last 3 years is 29.3. Average P/E ratio over last 5 years is 37.3. Other Trading Multiples: EV/EBITDA ratio 63.14, EV/FCF ratio 52.82. Summary: INOD's current valuations significantly exceed both its historical averages and industry benchmarks, suggesting market is pricing in substantial future growth expectations.
